narrative:
Precinct Rocksprings (precinct in Meigs County) has 300 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.3 percentage points.
